title: Washington Association of Disability Examiners, Renton-Seattle — By-Laws
description: By-laws of the Washington Association of Disability Examiners, Renton-Seattle chapter of NADE (Pacific Region). Articles cover the by-laws' identity and definitions, membership (Full and Associate classes), dues, duties of the officers (President, President Elect, Secretary, Treasurer, Pacific Regional Board Member), duties of the Executive Board, committees (Nomination, Constitution and By-Laws, Publicity, Long Range Planning), general-meeting voting, amendments, rules of order, an impeachment-of-officers process, and conference-attendee selection criteria.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Washington Renton-Seattle Chapter
source.title: Washington Association of Disability Examiners, Renton-Seattle By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Washington-R-S-Const-Bylaws.doc. The captured document is the chapter's By-Laws (it references but does not include a separate constitution). This is the Renton-Seattle Washington chapter, distinct from the Eastern Washington (EWADE) and Olympia (OlyWADE) Washington chapters in this directory; chapter name and region taken from the document body. The entire converted text is rendered bold (a conversion artifact). A 'Full Member in good standing as of June 30, 1977' grandfather clause is noted but no overall adoption/revision date is stated, so temporal_coverage is omitted. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
